case_title: JOSHUA PAUL NASSERI ET AL VS. CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED MAY-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC.
DECLARATION . FILED BY DEFENDANT CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-23-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA PAUL NASSERI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KENDRA FOREST NASSERI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA TAYLOR, HEAD OF OPERATIONS. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1000 IN AMAZON GIFT CARDS TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN-23-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NEITHER PARTY IS ALLOWED TO PUBLISH OR DISCUSS THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT. THIS AGREEMENT IS NOT AN ADMISSION OF FAULT OF EITHER PARTY. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM ***GRANTED***
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,315.59 FILED BY NASSERI, JOSHUA PAUL NASSERI, KENDRA FOREST AS TO DEFENDANT CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NASSERI, JOSHUA PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CREDIT KARMA TAX, INC.
